orbitals.name: Mercury
orbitals.description: Sun-blasted contracts and quiet survey crews.

landing_options.name: Terminus Bar
landing_options.description: Miners trade heat-sick rumors under shielded glass.

landing_options.name: Caloris Rim
landing_options.description: A crater overlook where the horizon bends hard.

landing_options.name: Fire Pits
landing_options.description: A galactically notorious extremophile fight club.

orbitals.name: Venus
orbitals.description: Cloud cities drift above a sealed furnace.

landing_options.name: Pearl Room
landing_options.description: Pilots drink under windows full of yellow stormlight.

landing_options.name: Cloud Deck
landing_options.description: A public rail above the sulfur haze.

orbitals.name: Earth
orbitals.description: Old money, crowded ports, and licensed violence.

landing_options.name: Blue Anchor
landing_options.description: Bounty clerks and dockhands keep separate corners.

landing_options.name: Old Harbor
landing_options.description: A preserved coast under too many cameras.

landing_options.name: Statue of Liberty
landing_options.description: Quaint.

orbitals.name: Luna
orbitals.description: Low-gravity ports and hard vacuum etiquette.

landing_options.name: Gray Mare
landing_options.description: Quiet booths, cheap oxygen, expensive secrets.

landing_options.name: Tranquility
landing_options.description: A fenced relic field watched by bored guards.

orbitals.name: Mars
orbitals.description: Red dust, veteran syndicates, and frontier courts.

landing_options.name: Rust Choir
landing_options.description: A loud cellar where warrants change hands.

landing_options.name: Valles Gate
landing_options.description: A canyon lift descending into red shadow.

orbitals.name: Ceres
orbitals.description: A hollowed rock with belt politics in every corridor.

landing_options.name: Stone Cup
landing_options.description: Belters argue routes over bitter recycled gin.

landing_options.name: Dawn Vault
landing_options.description: An old probe shrine behind pressure glass.

orbitals.name: Belt Exchange
orbitals.description: A freehold market parked between claim lines.

landing_options.name: Ledger Bar
landing_options.description: Every table has a broker, a debtor, or both.

landing_options.name: Spin Garden
landing_options.description: Three trees grown under contractual sunlight.

landing_options.name: Rig Manager's Office
landing_options.description: A cramped office with rig schedules, stale coffee, and art on the wall.

details.name: Admire the decor
details.description: A poster pin-up of a scantily clad Antarran "actress", complete with blue lipstick kiss. "From one hometown spawn to another -- Adira Kiwalanali".

orbitals.name: Jupiter
orbitals.description: Deep gravity, huge storms, and corporate patrols.

landing_options.name: Red Spotter
landing_options.description: Storm tourists and repo crews share the rail.

landing_options.name: Amalthea View
landing_options.description: A shielded balcony facing the inner moons.

orbitals.name: Ganymede
orbitals.description: Ice ports, farm domes, and careful neutrality.

landing_options.name: Ice Cellar
landing_options.description: Warm lamps, cold walls, no open weapons.

landing_options.name: Green Dome
landing_options.description: A farm arcology smelling faintly of soil.

orbitals.name: Cinder
orbitals.description: A cold red world with stubborn refinery towns.

landing_options.name: Red Wick
landing_options.description: Shift bosses drink beside silent bounty crews.

landing_options.name: Ash Flats
landing_options.description: A rust-black plain under a dim red sun.

orbitals.name: Gatehouse
orbitals.description: A customs wheel watching the Solward lane.

landing_options.name: Lock Nine
landing_options.description: Inspectors pretend not to hear useful things.

landing_options.name: Mirror Walk
landing_options.description: A viewport ring facing old traffic scars.

orbitals.name: Whiteharbor
orbitals.description: A bright transfer port with expensive silence.

landing_options.name: Blue Knife
landing_options.description: Couriers trade sealed favors over clear liquor.

landing_options.name: Dazzle Deck
landing_options.description: Filtered glass against a punishing white star.

orbitals.name: Marrow
orbitals.description: A mined shell with polished corporate districts.

landing_options.name: Gold Room
landing_options.description: Everything costs too much, including names.

landing_options.name: Core Lift
landing_options.description: A glass descent through exhausted strata.

orbitals.name: Flarehold
orbitals.description: A shielded outpost that goes dark on schedule.

landing_options.name: The Shutter
landing_options.description: Patrons count storms between unpaid debts.

landing_options.name: Storm Blind
landing_options.description: A bunker window opened only between flares.

orbitals.name: Thread
orbitals.description: A tethered moon town with careful loyalties.

landing_options.name: Spindle
landing_options.description: Locals pause when strangers use real names.

landing_options.name: Tether View
landing_options.description: A cable vanishing into orange light.
